input.headline: What the experts want you to know about these key ADHD symptoms

raw.headline: What the experts want you to know about these key ADHD symptoms

winner: Why did the ADHD expert bring a ladder to the meeting? To *attention* to the high standards of focus!

candidates.text: I was diagnosed with ADHD recently, so I asked my doctor if it's normal that I forget where I put my keys every day. She said, "Yes, that's actually a key symptom." I replied, "Well, that's just great—I can't even remember what I'm supposed to do with this joke now.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Smart wordplay on 'key symptom' and 'keys,' concise and surprising with a natural flow."}

candidates.text: The expert said ADHD makes it hard to focus on tasks, so I asked him to prove it by reading this sentence without looking at the next one. He failed spectacularly and immediately started organizing his bookmarks alphabetically.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific to the topic with a clever twist that ties back to ADHD symptoms."}

candidates.text: Experts say if your attention span is shorter than a goldfish’s, congratulations—you might have *normal* focus. ADHD starts when you can’t stop staring at a blank wall.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising comparison, specific ADHD reference, concise and clever twist on a common stereotype."}

candidates.text: Expert advice on ADHD symptoms is simple: stop doing the one thing your brain says is fine just because someone said it’s a disaster.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific to ADHD symptoms with a clever twist on expert advice."}

candidates.text: Why did the ADHD expert bring a ladder to the meeting? To *attention* to the high standards of focus!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'attention' and 'ladder,' but it's a bit forced and lacks specificity in relating to ADHD symptoms. The humor is mild and could be more surprising."}
